transcript: Some of the biggest billionaires in India are actually chartered accountants by training, Mr Birala, Mr Kotak, Mr Hiranandani. And I was recently looking at some data released by Nokri which made me realize that CA degree has the highest ROI in India on your career compared to any other profession. And I'll explain. CAs on an average earn 28% higher compared to their peers. In fact, by the time they have 10-12 years of experience, they earn 44% higher compared to their peers in finance who are either MBAs or CFAs. In fact, if you think that it is people in Mumbai who earn the highest packages as a chartered accountant, that's actually not true. It's the city of Gurgaon followed by Pune. It's the transport and power sectors which pay the highest packages to chartered accountants, and there are two skills specifically which if CA learn and implement it actually has the highest impact on taking up their pay packages, the first is financial modeling which takes up the average pay package for a CA by 48%, and the second is Power BI which takes it up by 41%. In fact, the macroeconomic winds for future growth and money making for chartered accountants in India are actually flowing towards GCC services where they begin to provide accounting services to US clients. In fact, if you know a chartered accountant who wants to learn more, earn more, please share this data released by Nokri with them so that it's a happy CA day and share it with someone who may need it.

caption:
#ad Some of the biggest billionaires in India are actually Chartered Accountants by training...

Mr. Kumar Mangalam Birla...
Mr. Hiranandani...
Mr. Uday Kotak...
The late Mr. Rakesh Jhunjhunwala...

And it’s one degree with the highest ROI for the amount spent in getting the degree...

Well, I was looking at some statistics released by Naukri, and found some insane numbers...

While the overall cost of the program may be less than Rs 3 lakh...

CA roles represent 24% of the total job postings in Finance...

So CAs on an average earn 28% more than non CA finance professionals... and those with 8-12 years of experience end up earning 44% more - compared to MBAs, CFAs, and others.

While most CA jobs come from Banking and the Big 4...

The next phase of growth for the profession is coming from GCC - which is outsourcing the world’s accounting to Indian talent because there just aren’t as many trained accountants in any part of the world...

Currently, Transport and Energy sectors pay the highest to CAs (on an average joining of Rs 22-23L)

Oh and Mumbai is not where the CAs earn the highest on an average... Gurgaon and Pune are where CA jobs outpay Mumbai

And there are two skills that give the highest jump to CA salaries - Financial Modeling, that takes up the average pay by 48%... and Power BI, which makes the average jump up by 41%

And on this CA Day, I would hope for CAs to use this data from Naukri to upskill, upearn, and continue growing their careers.

Wish you all a Happy CA Day.

#paidpartnership #casarthakahuja #NaukriCelebratesCAs

transcript: Congratulations ma'am, आपके 40,00,000 की home loan अप्रूव हो गई है ओ वाओ, interest किता pay करना पड़ेगा? 9% rate of interest के साबसे आपको हर वन 32,000 देना होगा और 30 years में घर आपका हो जाएगा ठीक है तो मैं इसके साथ हर दिन का 100 रुपए extra pay करूँगी कि मेरा loan जल्दी repay हो जाए Madam, लेकिन � सबर करो अच्छी मैं अगर ये 100 रूपी से एकशा पे करती हूँ तो 30 साल के जग़े 22 एयर्स में ही घर मेरा हो जाएगा और प्लस मेरा 25 लाग का इंटरेस भी बच जाएगा जादा तर लोग ऐसा करते नहीं है और इसी के वज़े से तो बैंक की कमाई होती है �

segments/11/text: और इसी के वज़े से तो बैंक की कमाई होती है
caption:
Save 25 lakhs in interest💰

By just paying 3000/- extra with your monthly EMI i.e ideally Rs. 100 for each day

We could also say that we are paying 13 EMIs instead of 12 EMIs in a year

If you prepay the home loan, you can substantially reduce the interest component of the home loan and reduce the tenure too. The principal amount gets repaid faster, helping you close the home loan early.

Prepayment of home loans may attract a penalty, particularly if it is availed on a fixed interest rate. However, prepayment charges may vary from lender to lender, and you can find more about it in the loan document and you can also negotiate on this amount by talking to the bank officials.
 
On the other hand, home loans availed on floating interest rates do not attract prepayment charges.

Calculator used to arrive at the amount-  https://cfplindia.com/extra-repayment-calculator.php  also it’s assumed that the prepayment starts from day 1

#homeloan #prepayment #banking #loans 

[Homeloan,  prepayment, banking, interest, prepayment of loan, floating interest, fixed interest]

caption:
Comment “LEADS” below and I will send the entire setup in your DM.

Someone just solved cold outreach for everyone. Now you can find leads, message them, and follow up for completely free. 

You used to pay hundreds a month for exactly this. The tool is called Open Outreach. You describe your product in one paragraph and tell it who your ideal customer is. 

That is the entire setup. The agent then searches LinkedIn, ranks every lead using a machine learning model that gets smarter over time, sends a connection request, waits for acceptance, and also fires a personalised follow-up. 

Everything is tracked in a built-in CRM. A fully automated outbound system running to generate quality leads for you.

#openoutreach #aiagent #claude #coldoutreach #leadgen
